title: High Molecular Weight (HMW) DNA Extraction Protocol for Tissue Sample
author: Aswini Leela Loganathan

steps.title: Lysis the tissue sample
steps.instruction: Lysis the tissue sample. Add 500 µL of lysis buffer to 50 - 150 mg of Sample of sample. Make sure the tissue sample has been finely cut.

steps.title: Denatures and digest proteins that are...
steps.instruction: Denatures and digest proteins that are subsequently hydrolyzed with Proteinase K. Add 10 µL of Proteinase K and vortex for 00:00:10 .

steps.title: Incubate on a shaking incubator at...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a shaking incubator at 55 °C for 02:00:00 ( or till dissolved).

steps.title: Remove RNA with RNAse
steps.instruction: Remove RNA with RNAse . Add 5 µL of RNAse and vortex briefly.

steps.title: Incubate in a shaking incubator for at 37 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate in a shaking incubator for at 37 °C .

steps.title: Partitioning of lipids and debris into...
steps.instruction: Partitioning of lipids and debris into an organic phase using P:C:IA. Add 500 µL of P:C:IA (25:24:1). Vortex until an emulsion is formed.

steps.title: Centrifuge at Room temperature for 00:10:00...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at Room temperature for 00:10:00 at 10000 x g, °C, .

steps.title: Pipette 200 µL of the aqueous...
steps.instruction: Pipette 200 µL of the aqueous layer into a new tube.

steps.title: Neutralize the charges on the sugar-phosphate...
steps.instruction: Neutralize the charges on the sugar-phosphate backbone of the DNA with Sodium Acetate. Add 1/10th : 20 µL 3M Sodium Acetate. Vortex gently (avoid creating bubbles).

steps.title: Precipitation Step. Add 2 Vol
steps.instruction: Precipitation Step. Add 2 Vol : 440 µL of ice-cold 100% Ethanol. Mix gently and slowly by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes .

steps.title: Wash Step
steps.instruction: Wash Step. Wash with ice-cold 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Repeat Wash Step (Step 13 and 14) 2 more times
steps.instruction: Repeat Wash Step (Step 13 and 14) 2 more times.

steps.title: Final elution
steps.instruction: Final elution. Add 35 µL of elution buffer (EB) and mix gently using a wide bore tips or by tapping.
